summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OSCILLATE underground techno collective platform - Iteration 3. Successfully tested all new features including QR codes, Stripe checkout, event detail pages, admin CRUD, rate limiting, and input validation. All backend APIs (36/36) and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 36 backend API endpoints (100% success)
Landing page loads all sections: hero, marquee, stats, gallery, events, artists, merch, platform, footer
Event cards TICKETS button navigates to /event/{eventId}
Event detail page at /event/evt-uberkikz shows flyer, title, date, venue, lineup tags, set times, ticket tiers
BOOK NOW button opens booking modal with name/email/qty/confirm
Stripe checkout via POST /api/checkout/create returns valid stripe URL
GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} returns payment status
QR code generated on POS ticket issue - qr_code field present in response
GET /api/ticket/{id}/qr returns PNG image (200 status)
POS Master (9969): 4 tabs, Issue Ticket shows QR after issuing
POS S1 Gate (0051): Door Tickets + Scan tabs
POS S2 Cover (0052): Cover Charge form with stats
Invalid PIN returns 401
Invalid email on /api/newsletter returns validation error
POST /api/checkout/create rejects invalid event_id (404) and invalid tier (400)
Admin POST /api/admin/events?pin=9969 creates event
Admin POST /api/admin/artists?pin=9969 creates artist
Admin DELETE /api/admin/events/{id}?pin=9969 deletes event
Admin unauthorized (wrong pin) returns 401
Merch section with category filters working (ALL/TEES/HOODIES/ACCESSORIES)
POS scan validates ticket ID and marks checked_in
Cover charge endpoint creates record
Door data endpoint returns tickets + revenue stats
Navigation links functional (HOME, EVENTS, ARTISTS, MERCH, MIXES, ABOUT, POS)
Event city filters working (ALL, BENGALURU, GOA, MUMBAI, MÜNCHEN)
Artists section displays 12 artists correctly
Gallery displays 12 images in grid layout
Newsletter email subscription form functional with validation
POS PIN authentication working for all 3 roles: Master (9969), S1 (0051), S2 (0052)
Wrong PIN shows proper error message 'INVALID PIN'
Master POS loads with 4 tabs: Issue Ticket, Door Data, Promoter Sales, Scan
S1 Gate POS loads with Door Tickets and Scan tabs
S2 Cover Charge POS loads with charge form and stats
LOCK button returns to PIN gate for all POS roles
Issue Ticket: Cash/Comp/Razorpay payment methods working
Issue Ticket: Event/tier selection and buyer details form functional
Door Data: Load button shows ticket records and stats
Promoter Sales: Log Sale form working
Scan tab: QR scan button and manual ticket ID entry functional
S1 Gate: Door ticket issuing with group size and event selection
S2 Cover: Charge form with amount, payment method, and stats display
Merch items show name, description, sizes, price, and ADD TO CART button
ADD TO CART buttons are clickable
Responsive design working on desktop viewport
All backend APIs for POS functionality working: /api/pos/auth, /api/pos/issue-ticket, /api/pos/door-data, /api/pos/cover-charge, /api/pos/scan
Merch API working with category filtering: /api/merch?category=tees/hoodies/accessories
Event detail API working: /api/events/{eventId}
QR code generation API working: /api/ticket/{id}/qr
Stripe checkout APIs working: /api/checkout/create and /api/checkout/status/{session_id}
Admin CRUD APIs working: /api/admin/events, /api/admin/artists with PIN authentication
Input validation working for email fields and required parameters
Rate limiting implemented on all endpoints
